142580.name: Daily new confirmed cases of COVID-19
142580.s_name: European CDC – Situation Update Worldwide – Last updated 23 November, 10:06 (London time)

source.name: European CDC – Situation Update Worldwide – Last updated 23 November, 10:06 (London time)
source.dataPublishedBy: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC)
source.additionalInfo: Raw data on confirmed cases and deaths for all countries is sourced from the European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC). Our complete COVID-19 dataset is a collection of the COVID-19 data maintained by Our World in Data. It is updated daily and includes data on confirmed cases, deaths, and testing. We have created a new description of all our data sources. You find it at our GitHub repository here. There you can download all of our data.

145448.name: Daily new confirmed cases of COVID-19
145448.s_name: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 24 November, 06:01 (London time)

source.name: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 24 November, 06:01 (London time)
source.dataPublishedBy: COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University
source.additionalInfo: Raw data on confirmed cases and deaths for all countries is sourced from the COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University. Our complete COVID-19 dataset is a collection of the COVID-19 data maintained by Our World in Data. It is updated daily and includes data on confirmed cases, deaths, hospitalizations, and testing. We have created a new description of all our data sources. You find it at our GitHub repository here. There you can download all of our data.
